author: JessieSun
description: Weekly Todo pages, editable calendar views, and Apple Calendar sync. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: JessieSun
manifest.description: Weekly Todo pages, editable calendar views, and Apple Calendar sync.
manifest.name: Weekly Todo Calendar

name: Weekly Todo Calendar

releases.author: JessieSun-vibe
releases.description:
## 1.2.0

- Add an editable weekly focus plan below the weekly calendar.
- Support add, edit, check off, delete, right-click delete, collapse/expand, layout toggle, and drag-and-drop sorting.
- Persist weekly focus changes back to the `## 本周重点` Markdown section.
- Automatically route past weekly files to `001-Past`, future weekly files to `002-Future`, and keep the current week at the calendar folder root.
- Update weekly focus styling to follow Obsidian light and dark themes.

releases.author: JessieSun-vibe
releases.description:
Publish source tree for Obsidian Community review.

Assets:
- main.js
- manifest.json
- styles.css

releases.author: JessieSun-vibe
releases.description:
Weekly Todo Calendar 1.1.0

- Weekly Todo notes open as a full-week calendar.
- Apple Calendar sync uses stable IDs and incremental updates.
- Includes delete handling and no completion timestamps.
